title: Citrusy Velvety Citrusy Porridge Oats
description: A paleo-friendly meal-prep Argentinian dish featuring citrusy velvety porridge oats that are tender and bursting with flavors.
instructions: Combine almond milk, buckwheat groats, and a pinch of salt in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 20-30 minutes or until the oats are tender and have absorbed most of the liquid.
In a small bowl, mix lime zest, orange zest, lemon juice, agave nectar, and vanilla extract. Stir into the porridge gently to avoid breaking up the oats.
Let the porridge sit for about 5 minutes before serving.
